name: financial_services_model_based_triage_millhaven_lib_eq
premise: A retail bank’s outage recovery playbook conflicts with a regulator’s informal guidance on customer communication timing. In Financial Services, the situation tagged internally around financial services model based triage millhaven lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Millhaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Legal has not signed off on data sharing between teams; analysts are inferring causality from incomplete joins. An automated batch or failover job is scheduled at the top of the hour; after it runs, rollback cost jumps by an order of magnitude. No option cleanly satisfies both liberty and equality; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Mei Chandra
agents.identity: I am Mei Chandra, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Financial Services. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Marco Sato
agents.identity: I am Marco Sato, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Financial Services. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so equality does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so liberty does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: The next irreversible system or legal step is imminent. Mei Chandra must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Mei Chandra do?
